notes: The maze template is only 26 rows but the canvas expects 31 rows (496/16), causing the maze to be incomplete and misaligned; ghost collision and pathfinding are rudimentary, pacman movement uses a simplistic canMove check that doesn't properly align to grid tiles making navigation feel broken, and the overall game is barely playable despite having the right structural skeleton.

Playable but clearly incomplete as Pac-Man: ghost AI/release rules and maze behavior are simplified or inaccurate, visuals are only approximate, and pause/escape behavior is inconsistent with on-screen prompts.
